title: Gendos Gooey Hand
wikitext:
[]: Gendo's Gooey Hand!             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Tue May 17, 2005 5:41 am Yeallo, My name's DirtyHamster and I'm a long time (confused) Eva fan. So, time to iron out the creases! How the hell did Gendo get Adam stuck to his hand? Somehow I don't think he slipped on it. Gendo: "Ahh crap :x , it's all over my hand. I told Kaji not to leave that there." Kaji:

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue May 17, 2005 10:44 am Somehow he stuck it on there so that he could keep better track of Adam. I don't think he trusted anyone else enough to watch it for him. It must be tight getting that glove over it though.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Tue May 17, 2005 10:54 am What about when he takes a shower. He'll be rubbing Adam all over his body. Ahhh crap :shock: , I can picture it now.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue May 17, 2005 12:43 pm DirtyHamster wrote: What about when he takes a shower. He'll be rubbing Adam all over his body. Ahhh crap :shock: , I can picture it now.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue May 17, 2005 1:04 pm Whats really creepy is that I believe he had that on his hand around the same time he was seeing Ritsuko. Either he kept the glove on when they did it or they had some very interesting sex.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 17, 2005 5:42 pm Nothing kinkier than foreplay involving the fetus of a deity. I fear the things Adam-chan has seen.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue May 17, 2005 6:11 pm Odd though since adam was part of gendo what would happen if Ritsuko got knocked up would their be an intresting looking child ? Edit: Their that better, not perfect, but it'll do.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 17, 2005 6:22 pm DatDude wrote: Odd though is adam was part of gendo and Ritsuko got knocked up would their be an intreting looking child ?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue May 17, 2005 6:28 pm I think he was asking if gendo and ritsuko had a kid, would it have angel dna. I believe the answer to this would probably be no. I don't think gendo and Adam ever really mingled their DNA. I think its a situation more like that mouse that had a human ear grafted to its back. If that mouse had kids none of them would be inheriting that ear.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 17, 2005 6:36 pm For a child of Gendo to have angelic DNA, Adam would have needed to somehow modify the DNA of the sperm-producing cells in Gendo's testes... Forget exactly how all that stuff works, but it's the genes from there (or, rather, half of the individual's genes randomly chosen and placed into a spermatozoon) that end up being invested into offspring.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue May 17, 2005 6:50 pm Just an odd idea that came into my brain after seeing that alterd pic of gendo speaking to his hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 17, 2005 7:37 pm He wasn't "speaking to his hand"; he was having a conversation with his fetal buddy.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue May 17, 2005 7:52 pm For some reason the " adam is a source of life" line is sticking in my head when I see that pic now. Great its ANOTHER idea i've got to add to my possable list of fics to wright.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 17, 2005 9:27 pm Now, just close your eyes and imagine Adam laying one of those big black eggs the Angels hatch out of... Kegel Power!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 18, 2005 9:44 am This is in the running for one of the most painful threads I've read here.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 18, 2005 10:45 am The Eva Monkey wrote: This is in the running for one of the most painful threads I've read here.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Wed May 18, 2005 10:58 am Mr. Tines wrote: DirtyHamster wrote: What about when he takes a shower. He'll be rubbing Adam all over his body. Ahhh crap :shock: , I can picture it now.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Wed May 18, 2005 11:01 am Sorry for two in-a-row but is it safe to assume that no one knows how & when Gendo fused with Adam?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed May 18, 2005 11:39 am Some time after ep 8 when Kaji brings adam from germany.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 18, 2005 4:12 pm Reichu wrote: For a child of Gendo to have angelic DNA, Adam would have needed to somehow modify the DNA of the sperm-producing cells in Gendo's testes...
